message:
fix(doc): enable learn.rs doc test (ignore → no_run with Result wrapper)

The learn module doc test was unnecessarily `ignore`d. Changed to `no_run`
(compiled but not executed since it touches filesystem) with proper
main/Result wrapper for ? operator compatibility.

Doc tests: 52 passed, 8 ignored (was 51 passed, 9 ignored).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
